title: Semver Toolkit
description: Parse, compare, sort, range-match (^ ~ >= ||), diff level and bump semantic versions. Fully local, zero deps.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing, comparison and range matching all run in your browser, following SemVer 2.0 (prerelease precedence; build metadata ignored in comparison).

sort.heading: Sort & maxSatisfying
sort.input: Version list (one per line, invalid lines ignored)
